response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with roughly 15 years of software development, including current staff-level fullstack work at Google using TypeScript and Node.js and direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators and agentic tooling), which matches a rare required skill. Prior roles cover React, MongoDB, AWS, Kubernetes, GraphQL, and a strong testing culture (TDD, test-runner authorship, Selenium training). Gaps are mostly stack-adjacent rather than fundamental: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest exposure, frontend history leans Ember over React, and Kotlin is absent, all of which are learnable for someone of this profile.
strengths: Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) at Google, matching a hard-to-find requirement
Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js experience across Google, Meta, and RIDE, plus cloud (AWS), Docker, and Kubernetes
Exceptional testing pedigree: TDD practitioner, author of test libraries/runners, and creator of testing workshops and courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, both named as primary stack items
Frontend depth skews toward Ember.js historically, with React appearing mainly in the Meta role
No Kotlin experience and only limited Java exposure for the secondary backend stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js/Vitest and thin React/Kotlin coverage
